scene.message: {nl}
Yukino: No helping it.{nl} Let's put him to sleep.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What!?{nl} Could it be... a Persona?{waitkey}{ret}
Toro: Uoooooh{waitkey}Damn it, damn it,{nl} a nobody like me, meee{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Not really~{nl} I just told the truth.{waitkey}Kinda like this{wait_fr:30}...{wait_fr:30}...{waitkey}{ret}
